meta.aesthetic: The Operating Record — ledger-modern, Cobalt Grid-derived, subject-grounded

concept.statement: The site is its own evidence — every page carries the live, typeset operating record of the AI team that runs it.
concept.mood: A QA lab notebook that updates itself: warm ivory paper, one strict electric-cobalt ink, faint graph-paper grid, hairline rules, green approval stamps. Daylight and calm in a category that hides in dark mode.
subjectWorld: approval gate and named human approvers
graph paper, hairline rules, ledger typography, stamps
concept.audienceFeeling: This is real and it is running right now — wonder wrapped in reassurance, for skeptical Dutch/EU enterprise buyers.
avoid: pill badge above centered hero H1
fabricated ledger data in production — the record must always be real

signature.element: The Operating Record — the real audit ledger, typeset
signature.location: Hero field log; persistent bottom record strip on every page; provenance blocks on articles
signature.implementation: Consumes the real audit trail (Taiga #347). Day one it shows the site's own AI-built commit/deploy history. Mono entries type on sequentially; human approvals appear as rotated green stamps with the approver's name.
signature.boldnessBudget: Strictly bichromatic cobalt-on-paper. Green is reserved for approval events only. No imagery. Calm ruled grid — display type and arriving ledger entries are the only loud elements.

imagery.direction: No photography, illustration or 3D. The ornament is real data typeset as ledger lines. Only geometric artifacts allowed: punch holes, stamps, hairline rules, graph-paper grid underlay (cobalt at 7% opacity, 32px cells).

layout.composition: Ruled ledger sheet: fixed marginalia column (132px) carrying mono record numbers (001, 002, ...) and micro-labels, separated by a hairline; content column to its right. Sections are numbered records divided by 2px ink rules. A persistent record strip is pinned to the bottom viewport edge.
layout.wireframe:
| 001 | DISPLAY HEADLINE ............ |
| LOG | ledger entries ... [stamp]    |
|-----+-------------------------------|
| 002 | section content ............. |
[ LAST ACTION 14:08 · ... ✓ ON RECORD ]
layout.rhythm: 32px graph-grid underlay; 1px hairlines between rows; 2px ink rules between numbered sections; generous 56-72px section padding

weightPairing.display: Newsreader italic 600 at display scale (hero: clamp(3.2rem, 7.2vw, 6.4rem), line-height 1.02, letter-spacing -0.015em)
weightPairing.emphasis: 700 italic (card names); mono 600 for stamps, buttons and mono labels

borders._radiusComment: Squareness is part of the ledger grammar: 2px buttons/stamps, 3px cards, nothing rounder. 'full' exists only for punch holes and the recording pulse dot.

shadows._comment: One hard offset shadow (card stock on paper) — never soft blur.

animations.choreography: One moment, on load: ledger entries fade/rise in sequentially (650ms stagger, 500ms each); each approval stamp scales in rotated -2deg with spring easing 450ms after its entry; a cobalt caret blinks on the final line; OKR bars fill 700ms after load (1.1s ease-out). The recording dot pulses at 2.2s. Nothing else on the page moves — no scroll animations in v1.

hero.library: none — CSS keyframes + ~20 lines vanilla JS (no animation dependency)
hero.reducedMotionStrategy: show-final-state: all entries visible, stamps placed, bars filled, no blink/pulse

accessibility._notes: Cobalt #1F2BE0 on paper #F2EFE6 ≈ 8:1 ✓. Ink #16233A on paper ≈ 12:1 ✓. Approval green #1F7A4D on paper ≈ 4.6:1 — use only bold/uppercase ≥10.5px with border (stamps) or ≥14px text.

components.header: Paper bg, 1px hairline bottom. Wordmark: 'ANAMATA' Public Sans 600 tracking 0.14em + '.AI' IBM Plex Mono 600 cobalt. Mono nav links 12.5px, ink at 82%, cobalt on hover.
components.button-primary: Solid cobalt, paper text, mono 600 13px uppercase tracking 0.05em, 12x22px padding, 2px radius. Hover: #1722B8.
components.button-ghost: Transparent, cobalt text + 1px cobalt border, same metrics. Hover: cobalt at 7% fill.
components.marginalia: 132px left column, hairline right border. Record number mono 600 13px cobalt; labels mono 10.5px ink at 55%, tracking 0.08em. Collapses to horizontal strip above content < 760px.
components.transparency-notice: Art. 50 disclosure as feature: 1px cobalt border with 4px left edge, '§50' glyph, mono kicker 11px cobalt tracking 0.08em, body 13.5px. Mandatory on every page (may be condensed in footer on subpages).
components.ledger: 2px ink top rule. Head row: mono 11.5px 600 tracking 0.14em + green 'RECORDING' pulse dot. Entries: grid 150px/1fr/auto, mono 13.5px, 1px hairline dividers. Timestamps cobalt-soft, agent names cobalt 500, A2A arrows ink at 60%.
components.approval-stamp: Mono 600 10.5px uppercase tracking 0.12em, green text + 1.5px green border, 2px radius, rotated -2deg, spring scale-in.
components.record-strip: Fixed bottom, ink bg, paper text, 2px cobalt top border, mono 12px. 'LAST ACTION' tag #9AA4E8, checkmark #7FD4A8. Present on every page.
components.personnel-card: White card stock, 1px ink border, 3px radius, hard offset shadow, punch-hole circle top-right (14px, 2px ink ring, paper fill). Kicker mono 10.5px cobalt 600; name Newsreader italic 700 30px; mono field rows with hairline dividers, keys at 55% opacity. Pending state: dashed border, 55% white fill, no shadow.
components.okr-bar: 8px tall, 1px ink border, 2px radius, cobalt fill, width transition 1.1s; mono 12px cobalt percentage line below.
components.provenance-block: (Insights pages) condensed ledger footer per article: drafted-by, approved-by (named human), published — same entry grammar as hero ledger.
components.demo-form: (Contact page) styled as 'file a request': mono labels, paper inputs with 1px ink borders, 2px radius; submission confirmation renders as a new ledger entry.
components.rings-diagram: (Approach page, from Direction 2) concentric permission rings as cobalt SVG line art on paper — inner/middle/outer annotated in mono; no fills, hairline strokes.
